examples: The use of sulphurous acid in the manufacture of apple juice is prohibited.
Saudi oil is generally more dense and sulphurous than the Libyan crude it will replace.
A great owl, with yellow sulphurous eyes, called to him by his name, but he made it no answer.
The problem is that this oil is sulphurous, molasses-thick and choked with sand.
The mood is sulphurous over Romania and Bulgaria, which joined in 2007.
